idea: Integrate Chroma CQT and MFCC features
notes: Adding Chroma and MFCC features decreased CV mean to 0.2747

idea: Tune LightGBM hyperparameters using Optuna on cached baseline features
notes: Optuna tuned CV accuracy reached 0.7378 | Tuned LGBM model achieves CV Accuracy 0.7378, beating baseline 0.2957 by 0.4421

idea: Feature fusion with Claude's Librosa features + adversarial feature selection to mitigate covariate shift
notes: Combined features with adversarial selection yielded CV 0.7369, slightly lower than 0.7378 baseline but with lower standard deviation (0.0148 vs 0.0172).

idea: Out-of-fold ensembling of baseline LGBM and combined-clean LGBM
notes: Ensembling at 0.5 weight each boosted CV accuracy to 0.7618. Submitted as sub_006.

idea: Tune XGBoost on combined clean features
notes: XGBoost tuning is extremely slow on local CPU for 82-class multiclass GBDT, killed

idea: Train Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) Classifier on combined clean features
notes: MLP Classifier on combined clean features with Adam solver and standard scaling | MLP Classifier on combined clean features achieved 0.86954 CV | MLP Classifier on combined clean features achieved 0.86954 CV and submitted as sub_007

idea: Extract high-resolution enhanced grid features (810 features) capturing odd/even harmonic ratios, low/mid/high harmonic energy, and multiple autocorrelation lag points. Concatenate with clean features (1284 features total) and train a multi-seed MLP + LGBM ensemble.
notes: Enhanced grid features capturing harmonic structure and fine lag interpolation boosted the ensembled CV accuracy to 0.93262 (std=0.0185), beating the prior best CV score of 0.92232 by +0.0103. Submitted as sub_011.

idea: Systematic sweep of MLP architectures and alternative classifiers on concatenated features
notes: Linear SVM C=1.0 achieves 0.88369 accuracy on 2-fold CV, beating baseline MLP (0.85536) by +0.0283 | Optimal MLP+SVM+LGB ensemble achieves 0.93476 CV (std: 0.01569), beating previous best of 0.93262 (std: 0.0185)

idea: Apply PCA dimensionality reduction (512 components) to scaled concatenated features before MLP training
notes: PCA reduces feature noise and collinearity from 1284 features to 512, boosting single MLP accuracy to 0.9433 | PCA=512 on single-seed MLP gets 0.94335 CV, beating previous 5-seed MLP CV (0.93476) by +0.00858 | Multi-Seed (5 seeds) MLP with PCA=512 achieves a spectacular 0.95451 CV accuracy, beating previous best 5-seed MLP + SVM + LGB ensemble (0.93476) by +0.01975

idea: RMS-normalized features + Cepstrum grid features + ensembling of PCA-MLP, PCA-SVM, Raw MLP, and LightGBM
notes: Mitigate covariate train/test loudness shift and add quefrency features | RMS normalization and cepstral features improved CV to 0.96524, a +0.0095 absolute gain. | Full 5-fold CV ensemble reaches 0.96524, a +0.0095 improvement over the previous ensemble of 0.95579.

idea: RMS-normalized CQT, Chroma, MFCC, Tonnetz, and Contrast features + PCA-MLP, PCA-SVM, Raw MLP, and LightGBM blend
notes: CQT/Chroma/MFCC/Tonnetz/Contrast features degraded accuracy on Fold 0 from 0.95494 to 0.94635 (delta -0.00858)

idea: Add PCA-MLP (256,256,128) and Raw-MLP (512,256,128) architectures to the V1 ensemble blend
notes: Fold 0 blend accuracy improved from 0.96352 to 0.96567 (+0.00215) | 6-model optimized blend achieved 5-Fold CV Accuracy of 0.96824 (std: 0.00852), which is a +0.00300 improvement over the 4-model baseline of 0.96524.

idea: Integrate YIN and HPS explicit pitch estimates into MLP+SVM+LGBM ensemble
notes: Hybrid ensemble of baseline MLPs + LGBM with pitch features. LGBM OOF improved to 0.9283, weight 0.27, overall CV stable at 0.96824 but higher diversity.

idea: Implement Adversarially-Weighted CV to align CV with public LB
notes: Reweight validation folds using adversarial validation probabilities

idea: Train LightGBM and MLP models on grid-only pitch features to eliminate covariate shift
notes: Excludes the first 494 baseline features which cause feature-induced overfitting

idea: Train a multi-model grid-only ensemble (7 models) excluding covariate shift features to maximize generalization and eliminate train-test shift
notes: Blend PCA-MLP, Raw-MLP, SVM, and LightGBM models trained purely on grid-only features.
